ValidationRule.description: Credit Check must be approved before moving status forward
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( ISCHANGED(Stage__c ), CASE(PRIORVALUE(Stage__c ),"Credit Check",1,0)=1, OR( ISPICKVAL(Stage__c , "Contract Sent"), ISPICKVAL(Stage__c , "Negotiation"), ISPICKVAL(Stage__c , "Sent to Back Office"), ISPICKVAL(Stage__c , "Opportunity Won"), ISPICKVAL(Stage__c , "Bid Won")),
OR ( ISPICKVAL( Credit_Status__c , "Rejected"), ISPICKVAL( Credit_Status__c , "Approval Pending"), ISPICKVAL( Credit_Status__c , "Approval Required"), ISPICKVAL( Credit_Status__c , "Approval In Process") ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Credit Check must be completed and approved before proceeding.
